name: skills
description: Claude Code skills for research, development, and GitHub automation

plugins.name: research-academic
plugins.description: Academic research skills including paper analysis, literature search, preprint discovery, grant management, and meeting minutes

plugins.name: lang-r
plugins.description: R package development with devtools, testthat, and roxygen2

plugins.name: lang-julia
plugins.description: Julia package development following SciML standards

plugins.name: lang-stan
plugins.description: Stan probabilistic programming with cmdstanr integration

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Development workflow skills for commits, linting, testing, code review, PRs, documentation, coverage, dependencies, project scaffolding, and task automation

plugins.name: github-ops
plugins.description: GitHub operations including dashboard, issue management, repo analysis, and issue scanning

plugins.name: org-management
plugins.description: GitHub organisation management including CI health, dependency audits, issue triage, maintenance, orchestration, releases, standards, and repo monitoring

plugins.name: bot-automation
plugins.description: Bot account automation for adding collaborators, processing task requests, and generating daily summaries

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Productivity skills for code cleanup, Obsidian notes, tmux workflows, UK news, weekly planning, and project inventory
